plugin.name: ThreeS_Stepper
plugin.author: Joakim
plugin.description:
Area stepper. Loads paths/mobs from 3s_areas.lua (same folder as this plugin).
Commands - <area> or walker <area> start botting an area (e.g. "- aegis") .. resume stepping .stop stop and save position .pause pause (keep position) .resume resume from saved position .dcr resume after a disconnect .stack <n> stack up to n mobs on next move killbot kill the bot completely pa <name> add party member (won't count as 'player found') pr <name> remove party member .set <opt> on|off options: autoresume hardmode .areas list known areas .binfo this help

trigger.name: bot_wall
trigger.match: ^You are unable to penetrate the wall that

alias.send: bot.stacknum = %1; Note("Stacking up to %1 mobs on next move")
dm_on = ("%1" == "on") SetVariable("dm_on", dm_on and "1" or "0") Note("[deadman] %1") dm_draw()
dm_secs = math.max(60, math.min(7200, %1)) SetVariable("dm_secs", tostring(dm_secs)) Note("[deadman] " .. dm_secs .. "s") dm_draw()

muclient.script:
require "movewindow"
-- ====================== state ====================== areas = {}
bot = { active = false, -- a stepper is loaded and running area = nil, cfg = nil, path = {}, pos = 1, armed = false, -- next prompt -> loot + walk mob_pending = nil, -- mob seen this room, engage on next prompt paused_on_mob = false, user_paused = false, -- explicit Pause-button state (vs combat pause) foundmob = false, -- saw a mob this lap (controls looping) lastdir = nil, stacknum = 0, no_home = false, hardmode = false, loop = false, -- restart the route when it ends (Loop button) opts = { autoresume = true }, } bot_flags = { player = false } -- player-in-room skip; loot flags removed with the loot system
party = {} local last_input = os.time() local CHAOS_ID = "5e6f7a8b9c0d1e2f3a4b5c6d" local dm_on = (GetVariable("dm_on") ~= "0") local dm_secs = tonumber(GetVariable("dm_secs")) or 600 local dm_visible = (GetVariable("dm_visible") ~= "0") local dm_info local rec = nil -- active path recording: { name=, path={}, mobs={}, kill= }
local function note(s) ColourNote("yellow", "", "[bot] " .. s) end local function dnote(s) ColourNote("silver", "", "[bot] " .. s) end
local function save_position() SetVariable("bot_active", bot.active and "1" or "0") SetVariable("save_area", bot.area or "") SetVariable("save_pos", tostring(bot.pos)) end
local function reset_room_flags() bot_flags.player = false end
-- ====================== area data ====================== local function load_areas() local dir = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 20) local ok, err = pcall(dofile, dir .. "3s_areas.lua") if not ok then ColourNote("red", "", "[bot] could not load 3s_areas.lua: " .. tostring(err)) else local n = 0 for _ in pairs(areas) do n = n + 1 end note(n .. " areas loaded (.areas to list, .binfo for help)") end end
-- ====================== looting ====================== -- ====================== walking ====================== -- reverse of each movement direction, for walking the route backwards local REV = { n = "s", s = "n", e = "w", w = "e", u = "d", d = "u", ne = "sw", sw = "ne", nw = "se", se = "nw", north = "south", south = "north", east = "west", west = "east", up = "down", down = "up", northeast = "southwest", southwest = "northeast", northwest = "southeast", southeast = "northwest", }
local function end_of_path() if bot.loop then note("end of path - looping back to the start") bot.pos = 1 bot.foundmob = false bot_step() else note("end of path - stopping" .. (bot.no_home and "" or ", heading home")) bot_kill() if not bot.no_home then Send("go home") end end end
function bot_step() if not bot.active or bot.user_paused then return end if bot.pos > #bot.path then end_of_path() return end local dir = bot.path[bot.pos] bot.lastdir = dir bot.pos = bot.pos + 1 Send(dir) ab_draw() end
function bot_path_undo() if rec then if #rec.path > 0 then local dropped = table.remove(rec.path) note("recording: move failed - dropped '" .. dropped .. "'") ab_draw() end return end if not bot.active then return end if bot.return_path then return end -- ignore blocked-move undo while returning bot.pos = math.max(1, bot.pos - 1) note("could not move - path position now " .. bot.pos .. "/" .. #bot.path) end
-- ====================== event handlers ====================== function bot_on_room(roominfo) if not bot.active then return end if bot.return_path then return end -- returning to start: prompts drive it if bot.paused_on_mob then if not bot.wimpy_warned then -- (wimpy guard) bot.wimpy_warned = true note("WIMPY! Moved during the fight - bot stopped, position saved.") note("Walk back to where you fought, then '.resume' to continue.") Sound("SysExclamation") bot_stop() end return end bot.wimpy_warned = false reset_room_flags() bot.mob_pending = nil bot.armed = true end
function bot_on_player(name) if not bot.active then return end for _, member in ipairs(party) do if name:find(member, 1, true) then return end end bot_flags.player = true end
function bot_on_mob(name) if rec then local clean = name:gsub("%s*%b{}", ""):gsub("%s*%b[]", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") if #clean > 0 and not rec.mobs[clean] then rec.mobs[clean] = true note("recording: mob noted - " .. clean) end return end if not bot.active or bot.paused_on_mob or bot.return_path or not bot.cfg then return end local entry = bot.cfg.mobs and bot.cfg.mobs[name] if not entry and bot.cfg.mobs then -- live lines often carry tags: 'A cave troll {angry} [scratched].' for k, v in pairs(bot.cfg.mobs) do if name:sub(1, #k) == k then entry = v break end end end local kill if entry then if entry.hard and not bot.hardmode then return end kill = entry.kill elseif bot.cfg.default_mob then kill = bot.cfg.default_mob end if kill then bot.mob_pending = kill end end
function bot_on_prompt() if not bot.active then return end if bot.user_paused then return end if bot.return_path then bot_advance_return() return end if bot.mob_pending then local mob = bot.mob_pending bot.mob_pending = nil if bot_flags.player then note("Found player. skipping!") bot_step() return end -- engage bot.armed = false bot.paused_on_mob = true bot.foundmob = true save_position() bot.current_mob = mob Send("kill " .. mob) if bot.stacknum > 0 then bot.stacknum = bot.stacknum - 1 note("Stacking " .. bot.stacknum .. " more.") bot.paused_on_mob = false bot.armed = true bot_step() end ab_draw() return end if bot.armed then bot.armed = false bot_step() end end
-- walk the route backwards to return to the start from wherever the bot is. -- replays the reverse of each step already taken, paced by the prompt. function bot_to_start() if not bot.active then note("bot is not active") return end local steps = bot.pos - 1 if steps <= 0 then note("already at the start") return end local rp, skipped = {}, 0 for i = steps, 1, -1 do local back = REV[bot.path[i]] if back then rp[#rp + 1] = back else skipped = skipped + 1 end end if #rp == 0 then note("route has no reversible steps - can't auto-return") return end bot.mob_pending = nil bot.paused_on_mob = false bot.armed = false bot.return_path = rp bot.return_sent = 0 note("returning to start: " .. #rp .. " steps back" .. (skipped > 0 and (" (" .. skipped .. " special steps skipped)") or "")) bot_advance_return() ab_draw() end
function bot_advance_return() if not bot.return_path then return end if bot.return_sent < #bot.return_path then bot.return_sent = bot.return_sent + 1 Send(bot.return_path[bot.return_sent]) else bot.return_path = nil bot.pos = 1 bot.paused_on_mob = false bot.user_paused = true note("arrived at start - paused (On/Off or Pause to run again)") ab_draw() end end
function bot_no_mob_here(name) if bot.active and not bot.user_paused and bot.paused_on_mob and bot.opts.autoresume and name == bot.current_mob then DoAfterSpecial(1, "bot_auto_resume()", sendto.script) end end
-- scheduled resume after a kill: recheck the pause at fire time so pausing -- during the post-kill delay still sticks function bot_auto_resume() if bot.active and not bot.user_paused then bot_resume_step() end end
-- after each killing blow, re-attack the kill target: if another of the same -- mob is here it engages it, otherwise the MUD's "There is no X here." fires -- bot_no_mob_here and the bot resumes walking. (replaces the old 'ki' autokill) function bot_on_killblow() if bot.active and not bot.user_paused and bot.paused_on_mob then DoAfterSpecial(1, "bot_reprobe()", sendto.script) end end
function bot_reprobe() if bot.active and not bot.user_paused and bot.paused_on_mob and bot.current_mob then Send("kill " .. bot.current_mob) end end
-- ====================== commands ====================== function bot_start(area) if not areas[area] then note("unknown area '" .. area .. "' (.areas to list)") return end local cfg = areas[area] bot.area = area; bot.cfg = cfg bot.path = cfg.path; bot.pos = 1 bot.loop = (cfg.no_loop ~= 1) -- loop by default unless the area is flagged no_loop bot.no_home = (cfg.no_home == 1) bot.hardmode = (cfg.hardmode == 1) bot.foundmob = false bot.paused_on_mob = false bot.user_paused = false bot.active = true reset_room_flags() save_position() note("botting '" .. area .. "' - " .. #bot.path .. " steps. '..' to step, .stop to stop.") bot_resume_step() ab_draw() end
function bot_resume_step() if not bot.active then note("bot is not active") return end bot.user_paused = false bot.paused_on_mob = false bot.mob_pending = nil bot.armed = false Send("!glance") ab_draw() end
function bot_pause() if not bot.active then note("Bot is not active") return end bot.user_paused = true bot.mob_pending = nil bot.armed = false note("paused at " .. (bot.pos) .. "/" .. #bot.path) ab_draw() end
function bot_stop() if not bot.active then note("Bot is not active") return end save_position() bot.paused_on_mob = true bot.armed = false note("stopped. position " .. bot.pos .. "/" .. #bot.path .. " saved (.resume / .dcr to continue)") ab_draw() end
function bot_resume_saved() local area = GetVariable("save_area") or "" local pos = tonumber(GetVariable("save_pos") or "") or 1 if area == "" or not areas[area] then note("nothing to resume") return end bot_start_quiet(area, pos) end
function bot_start_quiet(area, pos) bot_start(area) bot.pos = math.min(pos, #bot.path) note("resumed '" .. area .. "' at step " .. bot.pos) end
function bot_kill() bot.active = false bot.paused_on_mob = false bot.user_paused = false bot.armed = false bot.mob_pending = nil save_position() note("bot killed") ab_draw() end
-- ---- simplified controls: On/Off, Pause, Reset ---- function bot_toggle_onoff() if bot.active then bot_kill() -- Off: stop + save position else local area = (bot.area and bot.area ~= "" and bot.area) or GetVariable("save_area") or "" local pos = tonumber(GetVariable("save_pos") or "") or 1 if area == "" or not areas[area] then note("no area selected - click one in the list below") return end bot_start_quiet(area, pos) -- On: resume saved area where it left off end end
function bot_pause_toggle() if not bot.active then note("bot is not active") return end if bot.user_paused then bot_resume_step() -- continue (clears user_paused) else bot.user_paused = true bot_pause() end end
function bot_reset() if not bot.active then note("bot is not active") return end bot.pos = 1 bot.user_paused = false save_position() note("reset to step 1") bot_resume_step() end
function bot_set(opt, val) if bot.opts[opt] == nil and opt ~= "hardmode" then note("unknown option '" .. opt .. "'") return end if opt == "hardmode" then bot.hardmode = (val == "on") else bot.opts[opt] = (val == "on") end save_position() note(opt .. ": " .. val) ab_draw() end
-- auto-capture the party list from the in-game party table local pcap = nil
function party_capture_start() pcap = {} end
function party_capture_member(name) if pcap and name ~= "Name" then pcap[#pcap + 1] = name end end
function party_capture_end() if not pcap then return end if #pcap > 0 then party = pcap SetVariable("party", table.concat(party, "\n")) note("party captured: " .. table.concat(party, ", ")) end pcap = nil end
function bot_party_add(name) party[#party + 1] = name SetVariable("party", table.concat(party, "\n")) note("party: " .. table.concat(party, ", ")) end
function bot_party_remove(name) for i, m in ipairs(party) do if m == name then table.remove(party, i) break end end SetVariable("party", table.concat(party, "\n")) note("party: " .. table.concat(party, ", ")) end
function bot_list_areas() local t = {} for k in pairs(areas) do t[#t + 1] = k end table.sort(t) note("areas: " .. table.concat(t, ", ")) end
function bot_help() Note([[ 3S Stepper commands: - <area> / walker <area> start botting (see .areas) .. step/resume .stop stop+save .pause pause .resume / .dcr resume from saved position .stack <n> stack mobs pa/pr <name> party add/remove (skip-protection) .set <opt> on|off autoresume hardmode ]]) end
-- ====================== path recorder ====================== local REC_MOVES = { n=1, s=1, e=1, w=1, u=1, d=1, ne=1, nw=1, se=1, sw=1, north=1, south=1, east=1, west=1, up=1, down=1, northeast=1, northwest=1, southeast=1, southwest=1, out=1, enter=1, leave=1, }
function rec_start(name) name = name:lower() if name == "status" then rec_status() return end if rec then note("already recording '" .. rec.name .. "' - 'record save' or 'record cancel' first") return end if bot.active then bot_kill() end rec = { name = name, path = {}, mobs = {}, kill = nil } note("RECORDING area '" .. name .. "'. Walk the route; moves are captured.") note("Special steps: 'r: open door' Set kill word: 'record kill troll'") note("'record undo' drops the last step, 'record save' writes it, 'record cancel' discards.") ab_draw() end
function rec_special(cmd) if not rec then note("not recording - 'record <name>' first") Send(cmd) return end rec.path[#rec.path + 1] = cmd Send(cmd) note("recording: step " .. #rec.path .. " = '" .. cmd .. "'") ab_draw() end
function rec_undo() if not rec then note("not recording") return end if #rec.path == 0 then note("recording: nothing to undo") return end local dropped = table.remove(rec.path) note("recording: dropped '" .. dropped .. "' (" .. #rec.path .. " steps left)") ab_draw() end
function rec_setkill(word) if not rec then note("not recording") return end rec.kill = word note("recording: kill word = " .. word) end
function rec_status() if not rec then note("not recording. 'record <name>' starts; the route + mobs are captured as you walk.") return end local nm = 0 for _ in pairs(rec.mobs) do nm = nm + 1 end note(string.format("recording '%s': %d steps, %d mob types, kill word: %s", rec.name, #rec.path, nm, rec.kill or "(not set - 'record kill <word>')")) if #rec.path > 0 then note("route so far: " .. table.concat(rec.path, " ")) end end
function rec_cancel() if not rec then note("not recording") return end note("recording '" .. rec.name .. "' discarded") rec = nil ab_draw() end
function rec_save() if not rec then note("not recording") return end if #rec.path == 0 then note("recording: no steps - walk the route first (or 'record cancel')") return end local kill = rec.kill or "CHANGEME" -- build the lua block local function q(s) return '"' .. s:gsub('\\', '\\\\'):gsub('"', '\\"') .. '"' end local b = {} b[#b + 1] = " " .. rec.name .. " = {" local steps = {} for _, s in ipairs(rec.path) do steps[#steps + 1] = q(s) end b[#b + 1] = " path = { " .. table.concat(steps, ", ") .. " }," b[#b + 1] = " no_loop = 0, no_home = 1, hardmode = 0," local mobnames = {} for m in pairs(rec.mobs) do mobnames[#mobnames + 1] = m end table.sort(mobnames) if #mobnames > 0 then b[#b + 1] = " mobs = {" for _, m in ipairs(mobnames) do b[#b + 1] = " [" .. q(m) .. "] = { kill = " .. q(kill) .. " }," end b[#b + 1] = " }," end b[#b + 1] = " }," local block = table.concat(b, "\n") .. "\n" -- append into 3s_areas.lua (before the closing brace) local fn = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 20) .. "3s_areas.lua" local f = io.open(fn, "r") if not f then note("ERROR: cannot open " .. fn) return end local content = f:read("*a") f:close() local body = content:match("^(.*)}%s*$") if not body then note("ERROR: unexpected 3s_areas.lua format - not saved") return end f = io.open(fn, "w") if not f then note("ERROR: cannot write " .. fn) return end f:write(body .. block .. "}\n") f:close() -- hot-load so it's usable right away local newarea = { path = {}, no_loop = 0, no_home = 1, hardmode = 0, mobs = {} } for _, s in ipairs(rec.path) do newarea.path[#newarea.path + 1] = s end for _, m in ipairs(mobnames) do newarea.mobs[m] = { kill = kill } end if areas[rec.name] then note("note: '" .. rec.name .. "' existed - the new recording takes over") end areas[rec.name] = newarea note("saved '" .. rec.name .. "': " .. #rec.path .. " steps, " .. #mobnames .. " mob types -> 3s_areas.lua") if kill == "CHANGEME" then note("WARNING: no kill word was set - edit 3s_areas.lua and replace CHANGEME (or re-record)") end rec = nil ab_draw() end
-- ====================== bots window (tabbed: Area | Chaos | Deadman) ====================== local ABWIN = "areabot_" .. GetPluginID() local ABW = 300 local ab_info local ab_visible = (GetVariable("ab_visible") ~= "0") local ab_tab = GetVariable("ab_tab") or "Area"
local function ab_btn(id, x1, y1, x2, y2, label, active, tooltip) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 2, x1, y1, x2, y2, active and 0x707030 or 0x402818) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 1, x1, y1, x2, y2, active and 0x90C040 or 0x604020) WindowText(ABWIN, "fb", label, x1 + math.floor((x2 - x1) / 2) - #label * 4, y1 + 3, 0, 0, active and 0x80FFFF or 0xE0C8A0) WindowAddHotspot(ABWIN, id, x1, y1, x2, y2, "", "", "ab_button", "", "", tooltip or label, 1, 0) end
-- called by the chaos plugin when its tab bar hands over to us function ab_show_at(x, y, tabname) if not ab_info then ab_info = movewindow.install(ABWIN, 5, 0) end x, y = tonumber(x), tonumber(y) if x and y then ab_info.window_left, ab_info.window_top = x, y end if tabname and tabname ~= "" then ab_tab = tabname end ab_visible = true SetVariable("ab_visible", "1") SetVariable("ab_tab", ab_tab) ab_draw() end
function dm_button(flags, id) if id == "dm_power" then dm_on = not dm_on elseif id == "dm_minus" then dm_secs = math.max(60, dm_secs - 60) elseif id == "dm_plus" then dm_secs = math.min(7200, dm_secs + 60) end SetVariable("dm_on", dm_on and "1" or "0") SetVariable("dm_secs", tostring(dm_secs)) ab_draw() end
-- ---- recording via buttons (text entry through utils.inputbox) ---- function ab_record_start() if rec then note("already recording '" .. rec.name .. "' - Save or Cancel first") return end local nm = utils.inputbox("Area name (letters, digits, underscore - no spaces):", "Record new area", "") if not nm then return end nm = nm:gsub("%s+", "") if nm == "" then return end if nm:match("^[A-Za-z_]%w*$") then rec_start(nm) else note("invalid area name '" .. nm .. "' - letters/digits/underscore only") end end
function ab_record_kill() if not rec then return end local w = utils.inputbox("Kill command for mobs here (e.g. sentry):", "Set kill word", rec.kill or "") if w then w = w:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") end if w and w ~= "" then rec_setkill(w) ab_draw() end end
function ab_record_mob() if not rec then return end local m = utils.inputbox("Mob name as it appears in the room (e.g. Aegis Sentry):", "Add mob", "") if m then m = m:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") end if m and m ~= "" then rec.mobs[m] = true note("recording: mob added - " .. m) ab_draw() end end
function ab_button(flags, id) if id == "ab_onoff" then bot_toggle_onoff() elseif id == "ab_pause" then bot_pause_toggle() elseif id == "ab_reset" then bot_reset() elseif id == "ab_loop" then bot.loop = not bot.loop note("loop: " .. (bot.loop and "on" or "off")) ab_draw() elseif id == "ab_tostart" then bot_to_start() elseif id == "ab_rec" then ab_record_start() elseif id == "ab_recsave" then rec_save() elseif id == "ab_reccancel" then rec_cancel() elseif id == "ab_recundo" then rec_undo() elseif id == "ab_reckill" then ab_record_kill() elseif id == "ab_recmob" then ab_record_mob() elseif id == "ab_hide" then ab_visible = false SetVariable("ab_visible", "0") WindowShow(ABWIN, false) return elseif id == "tab_Area" or id == "tab_Deadman" then ab_tab = id:sub(5) SetVariable("ab_tab", ab_tab) elseif id == "tab_Chaos" then -- hand the window position over to the chaos plugin local x = ab_info and ab_info.window_left or 0 local y = ab_info and ab_info.window_top or 0 ab_visible = false SetVariable("ab_visible", "0") WindowShow(ABWIN, false) local rc = CallPlugin(CHAOS_ID, "cs_show_at", tostring(x), tostring(y)) if rc ~= 0 then note("chaos sea plugin not available") ab_visible = true SetVariable("ab_visible", "1") ab_draw() end return elseif id == "ab_pickarea" then local items = {} for k in pairs(areas) do items[#items + 1] = k end table.sort(items) if #items == 0 then note("no areas recorded yet - use Rec to record one") return end local choice = WindowMenu(ABWIN, 8, 145, table.concat(items, "|")) if choice and choice ~= "" then bot_start(choice) end return end ab_draw() end
local function ab_tabs_row() local tw = math.floor((ABW - 2) / 3) for i, t in ipairs({ "Area", "Chaos", "Deadman" }) do local x1 = 1 + (i - 1) * tw local sel = (t == ab_tab) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 2, x1, 18, x1 + tw - 1, 36, sel and 0x604020 or 0x301E12) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 1, x1, 18, x1 + tw - 1, 36, 0x604020) WindowText(ABWIN, sel and "fb" or "f", t, x1 + math.floor(tw / 2) - #t * 4, 22, 0, 0, sel and 0x40C0FF or 0xD0D0D0) WindowAddHotspot(ABWIN, "tab_" .. t, x1, 18, x1 + tw - 1, 36, "", "", "ab_button", "", "", t, 1, 0) end end
local function ab_draw_area() local txt2, col2 if rec then local nm = 0 for _ in pairs(rec.mobs) do nm = nm + 1 end txt2, col2 = string.format("RECORDING %s: %d steps, %d mobs", rec.name, #rec.path, nm), 0x40C0FF elseif not bot.active then txt2, col2 = "OFF - click an area below to start", 0x808080 elseif bot.user_paused then txt2, col2 = "PAUSED " .. (bot.area or "?") .. " - press Pause to continue", 0x40C0FF elseif bot.paused_on_mob then txt2, col2 = "FIGHTING - resumes when clear", 0x5050F0 else txt2, col2 = "WALKING " .. (bot.area or "?"), 0x60E060 end WindowText(ABWIN, "fb", txt2, 8, 40, 0, 0, col2)
if rec then -- recording controls ab_btn("ab_recsave", 8, 73, 78, 93, "Save", false, "Save this area to 3s_areas.lua") ab_btn("ab_recundo", 84, 73, 154, 93, "Undo", false, "Drop the last recorded step") ab_btn("ab_reccancel",160, 73, 254, 93, "Cancel", false, "Discard this recording") ab_btn("ab_hide", 256, 73, 292, 93, "X", false, "Hide ('areabot' brings it back)") ab_btn("ab_reckill", 8, 97, 150, 117, "Kill: " .. (rec.kill or "?"), rec.kill ~= nil, "Set the kill command for mobs here") ab_btn("ab_recmob", 156, 97, 228, 117, "+ Mob", false, "Add a mob name to target") WindowText(ABWIN, "fb", "Route (" .. #rec.path .. " steps)", 8, 123, 0, 0, 0x40C0FF) WindowText(ABWIN, "f", (#rec.path > 0 and table.concat(rec.path, " ") or "(walk to record)"):sub(1, 64), 8, 137, 0, 0, 0xC0C0C0) local ml = {} for m in pairs(rec.mobs) do ml[#ml + 1] = m end table.sort(ml) WindowText(ABWIN, "fb", "Mobs (" .. #ml .. ")", 8, 153, 0, 0, 0x40C0FF) local y = 167 for _, m in ipairs(ml) do WindowText(ABWIN, "f", m:sub(1, 44), 8, y, 0, 0, 0xC0C0C0); y = y + 13 if y > 290 then break end end return end
local total = #bot.path local done = math.max(0, bot.pos - 1) WindowText(ABWIN, "f", string.format("step %d / %d", done, total), 8, 55, 0, 0, 0x909090) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 2, 100, 57, 292, 67, 0x2A1C14) if total > 0 then local fill = math.floor(190 * math.min(done / total, 1)) if fill > 0 then WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 2, 101, 58, 101 + fill, 66, 0x40A040) end end WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 1, 100, 57, 292, 67, 0x604020) ab_btn("ab_onoff", 8, 73, 86, 93, bot.active and "On" or "Off", bot.active, "Start / stop the bot") ab_btn("ab_pause", 92, 73, 170, 93, "Pause", bot.user_paused, "Pause / continue, keep position") ab_btn("ab_reset", 176, 73, 254, 93, "Reset", false, "Restart the route at step 1") ab_btn("ab_hide", 256, 73, 292, 93, "X", false, "Hide ('areabot' brings it back)") ab_btn("ab_loop", 8, 97, 86, 117, "Loop", bot.loop, "Loop the route when done (off = one run, then home)") ab_btn("ab_tostart", 92, 97, 170, 117, "Rewind", bot.return_path ~= nil, "Walk back to the start of the route from here") ab_btn("ab_rec", 176, 97, 254, 117, "Rec", false, "Record a new area path") -- area picker: a dropdown menu (WindowMenu) instead of a long list local nareas = 0 for _ in pairs(areas) do nareas = nareas + 1 end local lbl = (bot.active and bot.area) and (bot.area .. " v") or "Choose area v" ab_btn("ab_pickarea", 8, 125, 200, 145, lbl, false, "Pick an area to run (" .. nareas .. " available)") end
local function ab_draw_deadman() local idle = os.time() - last_input local running = bot.active or (GetPluginVariable(CHAOS_ID, "auto") == "1") local line1, col1 if not dm_on then line1, col1 = "OFF - bots never auto-stop", 0x808080 else line1, col1 = string.format("stops bots after %dm idle", math.floor(dm_secs / 60)), 0x60E060 end WindowText(ABWIN, "f", line1, 8, 42, 0, 0, col1) local idlecol = 0x909090 if dm_on and running and idle > dm_secs * 0.8 then idlecol = 0x5050F0 end WindowText(ABWIN, "f", string.format("idle %dm %02ds %s", math.floor(idle / 60), idle % 60, running and "bot RUNNING" or "no bot active"), 8, 56, 0, 0, idlecol) dm_btn_in_ab("dm_power", 8, 74, 64, 94, dm_on and "ON" or "OFF", dm_on, "Stop all bots when idle too long") dm_btn_in_ab("dm_minus", 70, 74, 94, 94, "-", false, "One minute less") WindowText(ABWIN, "f", string.format("%dm", math.floor(dm_secs / 60)), 100, 77, 0, 0, 0xF0F0F0) dm_btn_in_ab("dm_plus", 134, 74, 158, 94, "+", false, "One minute more") ab_btn("ab_hide", 256, 74, 292, 94, "X", false, "Hide ('deadman' brings it back)") end
function dm_btn_in_ab(id, x1, y1, x2, y2, label, active, tooltip) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 2, x1, y1, x2, y2, active and 0x707030 or 0x402818) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 1, x1, y1, x2, y2, active and 0x90C040 or 0x604020) WindowText(ABWIN, "fb", label, x1 + math.floor((x2 - x1) / 2) - #label * 4, y1 + 3, 0, 0, active and 0x80FFFF or 0xE0C8A0) WindowAddHotspot(ABWIN, id, x1, y1, x2, y2, "", "", "dm_button", "", "", tooltip or label, 1, 0) end
function ab_draw() if not ab_visible then return end if not ab_info then ab_info = movewindow.install(ABWIN, 5, 0) end local ABH if ab_tab == "Deadman" then ABH = 104 elseif rec then ABH = 306 -- recording needs room for route + mob list else ABH = 155 end -- compact: controls + area dropdown WindowCreate(ABWIN, ab_info.window_left, ab_info.window_top, ABW, ABH, ab_info.window_mode, ab_info.window_flags, 0x101418) WindowFont(ABWIN, "f", "Lucida Console", 9, false, false, false, false) WindowFont(ABWIN, "fb", "Lucida Console", 9, true, false, false, false) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 1, 0, 0, ABW, ABH, 0x604020) WindowRectOp(ABWIN, 2, 1, 1, ABW - 1, 17, 0x402818) WindowText(ABWIN, "fb", "Bots", 8, 3, 0, 0, 0x40C0FF) movewindow.add_drag_handler(ABWIN, 0, 0, ABW, 17, miniwin.cursor_hand) ab_tabs_row() if ab_tab == "Deadman" then ab_draw_deadman() else ab_draw_area() end WindowShow(ABWIN, true) end
function ab_toggle_window() ab_visible = not ab_visible SetVariable("ab_visible", ab_visible and "1" or "0") if ab_visible then ab_tab = "Area" SetVariable("ab_tab", ab_tab) ab_draw() else WindowShow(ABWIN, false) end end
function dm_toggle_window() if ab_visible and ab_tab == "Deadman" then ab_visible = false SetVariable("ab_visible", "0") WindowShow(ABWIN, false) else ab_tab = "Deadman" SetVariable("ab_tab", ab_tab) ab_visible = true SetVariable("ab_visible", "1") ab_draw() end end
function dm_draw() if ab_visible and ab_tab == "Deadman" then ab_draw() end end
-- ====================== idle deadman switch ====================== function OnPluginCommand(text) last_input = os.time() if rec then for token in text:gmatch("[^;]+") do local t = token:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", ""):lower() if REC_MOVES[t] then rec.path[#rec.path + 1] = t note("recording: step " .. #rec.path .. " = " .. t) ab_draw() end end end return true end
function bot_idle_check() local idle = os.time() - last_input if dm_on and idle > dm_secs then local fired = false if bot.active and not bot.paused_on_mob then bot_stop() fired = true end if GetPluginVariable(CHAOS_ID, "auto") == "1" then Execute("cs auto off") fired = true end if fired then note("DEADMAN: " .. math.floor(dm_secs / 60) .. "m without input - bots stopped") Sound("SysExclamation") end end dm_draw() end
AddTimer("bot_idle", 0, 0, 5, "", timer_flag.Enabled + timer_flag.Replace, "bot_idle_check")
-- ====================== init ====================== function OnPluginSaveState() if ab_info then movewindow.save_state(ABWIN) end end
function OnPluginInstall() load_areas() ab_draw() local p = GetVariable("party") if p and p ~= "" then for m in p:gmatch("[^\n]+") do party[#party + 1] = m end end end
